shots.title: OPEN-RECUMBENT Camera A — Over Bike B Toward Character A on Bike A — 2026-06-17 00:55 PT
shots.note: CURRENT REVIEW LOCK CANDIDATE. Fixed-world map: Character B stays on Bike B, the left/near bike; Character A stays on Bike A, the right/far bike. Camera A is over Character B's blurred blonde shoulder/hair toward Character A. The women do not switch bikes, seats, sides, or places; only the camera angle changes. Bike A and Bike B should read as the same sleek 2026 premium recumbent model: open front cockpit, compact rider-facing touchscreen, side/base handles beside the seat, reclined black seat/backrest, black satin aerodynamic frame, vented flywheel housing, logical crank/pedal placement, and no bulky upright-style front handlebars.

shots.title: CLONED-BIKE Camera B — Over Bike A Toward Character B on Bike B — 2026-06-17 01:40 PT
shots.note: CURRENT REVIEW LOCK CANDIDATE. Fixed-world map: Character B stays on Bike B, the left/near bike; Character A stays on Bike A, the right/far bike. Camera B moves to the opposite conversation angle over Character A's blurred brunette shoulder/ponytail from Bike A, looking toward Character B on Bike B. The women do not switch bikes, seats, sides, or places; only the camera angle changes. This B shot was rerun using Camera A as the bike make/model source. Bike A and Bike B should read as the same sleek 2026 premium recumbent make/model as Camera A: open front cockpit, compact attached rider-facing touchscreen, side/base handles beside the seat, reclined black seat/backrest, black satin aerodynamic frame, vented flywheel housing, logical crank/pedal placement, and no bulky upright-style front handlebars. Feet must stay on the correct left/right pedals of each woman's own bike with no crossed-foot or opposite-pedal geometry.
